security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Convert documents to clean Markdown — offline.
bundle.longDescription: MDFlux turns PDFs, Office files, images, audio and more into clean Markdown. It self-installs its dependencies on first launch, runs fully offline, and adds batch processing, cleanup, OCR/transcription, and an optional local/API intelligence layer on top of Microsoft's MarkItDown.
